entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cultivated chickpea targeted for genetic improvement

entities.name: WILD CICER SPECIES
entities.description: Wild species of Cicer used to broaden the genetic base of cultivated chickpea

entities.name: TISSUE CULTURE
entities.description: Laboratory techniques used to facilitate hybridization and utilization of wild species

entities.name: EVOLUTIONARY BOTTLENECKS
entities.description: Events that have reduced the genetic diversity of cultivated chickpea

entities.name: GENETIC BASE
entities.description: The total genetic diversity available within the chickpea population

entities.name: DISEASES AND PESTS
entities.description: Biological threats that cultivated chickpea is susceptible to due to a narrow genetic base

entities.name: USEFUL TRAITS
entities.description: Desirable characteristics from wild species to be introduced into cultivated chickpea

entities.name: EMBRYO RESCUE
entities.description: A technique used to save aborting embryos from incompatible crosses

entities.name: GROWTH REGULATORS
entities.description: Chemical substances applied to pollinated pistils to improve cross success

entities.name: GRAFTING
entities.description: The process of attaching hybrid shoots to chickpea stocks to improve survival
